GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [nation_count@1 DESC, r_name@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec
    GpuProjectExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[r_name], aggr=[count(*)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=26843545
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([r_name@0], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[r_name], aggr=[count(*)]
              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=26843545
                  GpuHashJoinExec
                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=26843545
                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=26843545
